# Finch: Self-Care Pet · Habit Tracker

Generated: Jul 21, 2026, 7:07 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 7, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _plantguyhome_, May 28, 2026, 1/5: "I was so excited to use this app, even considered premium, but sadly my data gets lost every time after exiting the app for a while. This means everything is gone and I just get an apology over and over. For an app that’s meant to help people (especially ones with special conditions) this felt really frustrating to me and really killed my energy yesterday, as it has happened multiple times just yesterday. If I hatch a new pet I DON’T get the promised 500 currency + the data gets lost again. 🫤 UPDATE: Now I can’t even hatch a new egg, because the App just turns grey. Whenever I try to access the old data the screen goes white for an infinite time. So I can neither log in nor create a new one. It’s just completely broken on Iphone ig."
            2. _I hate. Finch_, Jul 9, 2026, 2/5: "Finch is bad because it I so slow"
            3. _wolkenflauschig_, May 7, 2026, 4/5: "app is crashing more often lately :("

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Mr. T-Wrecks_, Jul 18, 2026, 3/5: "I like the app. It has helped me stay focused and productive throughout the day. The only thing that really bothers me is the Shop items. If you’re a Free user, you only get 8 options in Outfit and Furniture to choose from (16 with the free re-roll). But the options are the worst options—they’re typically the most boring/generic options, and they follow the same pattern every time. All the good options require Finch Plus. Why? Free users are earning the same points in the same way as any user on Finch Plus. The items are already behind one “paywall” (in-game currency”). Why put them behind two?"
